unit: Unit 12: Everyday Life with Your Mac
title: Common Daily Tasks
drDigitalIntro: Most people use their Mac for a few main things: checking email, browsing the web, watching videos, organizing files, and communicating with family. This unit covers these everyday tasks so you feel confident using your Mac for whatever you need.
drDigitalSuccess: You're ready for everyday Mac use!
drDigitalHint: The skills you've learned so far cover most of what you'll do daily.
